{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ruby
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Blood Shadow, Overlady
| abilities = Steelborn Iron body, Moonlight Bridge, Goldsigns, Endless Sword technique, blood aura, blood madra
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The bone ring contained a [[ruby]] that once gave off a powerful blood [[aura]].}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|She looked up at him with Yerin’s face and spoke in a satisfied tone. “Ruby!”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Dross had overheard the report Fury received about Yerin becoming some kind of half-Herald, but he hadn’t known what to make of it. Who was this? "Yerin or Ruby?" he asked warily.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
